landing.hero.subline_1: AI-powered travel planning that adapts to your style
landing.hero.subline_2: From bookings to expenses, all in one place
landing.hero.subline_3: Collaborate with friends and family in real time
landing.hero.subline_4: Personalized recommendations based on your interests
landing.features.title: Everything You Need for Seamless Travel
landing.features.subtitle: From planning to sharing memories, Neyya handles every aspect of your journey.
landing.features.booking_import_desc: Connect your email and we automatically extract flight, hotel, and car rental bookings.
landing.features.maps_desc: See all your trip locations on a map with custom markers, routes, and nearby POIs.
landing.features.ai_search_desc: Find restaurants, activities, and attractions using natural language — personalized to your tastes.
landing.features.expenses_desc: Scan receipts, track spending by category, split costs with travel companions.
landing.features.timeline_desc: See your entire trip day-by-day with bookings, events, and weather forecasts.
landing.features.collaboration_desc: Share trips, vote on activities, and plan together with real-time updates.
landing.how_it_works.title: How It Works
landing.how_it_works.subtitle: Get started in minutes, not hours.
landing.how_it_works.step1_desc: Link your email and we automatically import your booking confirmations.
landing.how_it_works.step2_desc: Organize trips, explore destinations, and collaborate with your travel group.
landing.how_it_works.step3_desc: Access everything offline, get smart reminders, and track expenses on the go.
landing.about.title: About Us
landing.about.paragraph_1: Neyya was born from a simple frustration: planning trips shouldn't require a dozen apps and spreadsheets. We built an all-in-one platform that uses AI to make travel planning effortless.
landing.about.paragraph_2: The name "Neyya" comes from Sanskrit, meaning "to guide." Our mission is to give every traveler a personal AI guide that understands their preferences, handles the logistics, and lets them focus on what matters most — enjoying the experience.
landing.about.paragraph_3: Whether you're a solo backpacker or planning a family vacation, we adapt to your style and make every trip smoother.
landing.testimonials.title: Loved by Travelers Worldwide
landing.testimonials.quote_1: Finally, one app that handles everything. No more switching between 5 different tools.
landing.testimonials.quote_2: The AI search found a perfect restaurant that matched my dietary needs in Tokyo. Amazing!
landing.testimonials.quote_3: Splitting expenses with our travel group used to be a nightmare. Not anymore!
landing.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
landing.faq.contact: Can't find what you're looking for? Contact us at support@travelcompanion.app
landing.faq.a1: Yes! We offer a generous free tier with all core features. Premium plans add advanced AI features and priority support.
landing.faq.q2: How do you import my bookings?
landing.faq.a2: Connect your Gmail or Outlook and we scan for booking confirmation emails. We extract flight, hotel, and car rental details automatically.
landing.faq.a3: Absolutely. We use end-to-end encryption for sensitive data, comply with GDPR, and never sell your information to third parties.
landing.faq.a4: Yes! Select up to 10 trips for offline access. Your data syncs automatically when you reconnect.
landing.faq.a5: Yes — invite up to 20 collaborators to any trip. Everyone can add items, vote on activities, and split expenses.
landing.cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Travel Experience?
landing.cta.subtitle: Join thousands of travelers who plan smarter, not harder.
landing.footer.tagline: AI-powered travel planning that adapts to your style. Plan, book, and explore with confidence.
flight.meal.STD.desc: Regular airline meal with no special requirements
flight.meal.VGML.desc: Completely plant-based. No meat, dairy, eggs, or honey
flight.meal.AVML.desc: Spiced Indian-style vegetarian. Contains dairy but no meat or fish
flight.meal.VJML.desc: No root vegetables (potatoes, onions, garlic) and no animal products
flight.meal.RVML.desc: Served as raw fruits and vegetables
flight.meal.GFML.desc: Excludes wheat, barley, and rye for celiac disease or gluten sensitivity
flight.meal.NLML.desc: Excludes cow's milk and dairy products. Not for severe milk allergies
flight.meal.DBML.desc: Low in sugar and simple carbs. Manages blood sugar
flight.meal.LSML.desc: Prepared with little to no added salt or baking powder
flight.meal.BLML.desc: Soft, non-spicy foods meant to be gentle on the stomach
flight.meal.KSML.desc: Prepared under strict Jewish dietary laws. Meals are typically double-wrapped
flight.meal.MOML.desc: Prepared strictly following Islamic dietary laws. No pork or alcohol
flight.meal.HNML.desc: Non-vegetarian food prepared in Indian style. No beef or pork
flight.meal.CHML.desc: Popular foods for kids like nuggets, pasta, and fruit
flight.meal.BBML.desc: Includes jars of baby food, purees, or milk
flight.meal.disclaimer: Meal availability may vary by airline and route
